message:
test(search): add lifecycle coverage for chunk vector store generations and retention

Adds focused integration-style tests for the semantic chunk vector storage path introduced
for recorder hybrid retrieval.

Coverage added:
- generation lifecycle:
  - register_generation
  - activate_generation
  - active_generation reads
- embedding lifecycle:
  - initial upsert vs update semantics
  - deterministic search reranking after embedding update
- guardrails:
  - chunk policy-version mismatch rejection for generation boundaries
- retention:
  - prune_chunks_through_ordinal deletes expected ranges and preserves newer chunks
- drift reporting:
  - validates lag/schema drift signals via drift_report outputs

Why:
- The storage layer now carries semantic generation metadata and retention semantics;
  this test suite ensures those invariants are enforced and regression-detectable.

Notes:
- Uses temporary sqlite databases via tempfile for isolated, reproducible runs.
- Keeps vectors normalized in-test to make similarity assertions stable.
